question: As of FY2023Q1, why did Pepsico raise full year guidance for FY2023?
answer: Pepsico raised its full-year guidance for FY2023 due to its strong performance in the first quarter. The Chairman and CEO stated, "Given our strong start to the year, we now expect our full-year 2023 organic revenue to increase 8 percent (previously 6 percent) and core constant currency EPS to increase 9 percent (previously 8 percent)" (page 1).
